title: Border Patrol Agents Fatally Shoot U.S. Citizen Alex Pretti in Minneapolis
excerpt: Federal Border Patrol agents shot and killed Alex Pretti, a 37-year-old ICU nurse and Minneapolis resident, on January 24 — the third shooting by federal immigration agents in Minneapolis in less than three weeks. Bystander video conflicted with the government's account that Pretti was brandishing a firearm.
content:
On January 24, 2026, federal Border Patrol agents fatally shot Alex Jeffrey Pretti, a 37-year-old intensive care nurse and Minneapolis resident, near Nicollet Avenue and West 26th Street. The shooting marked the third involving federal agents in Minneapolis in less than three weeks, and the second fatal shooting of a U.S. citizen.

Video obtained by Reuters and reviewed by multiple news outlets showed a federal officer removing a firearm from Pretti's waist holster before another officer drew his weapon and fired — appearing to contradict the Trump administration's claim that Pretti was 'brandishing' a gun. The Hennepin County Medical Examiner later ruled Pretti's death a homicide by multiple gunshot wounds.

  • Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey described video showing 'more than six masked agents pummeling one of our constituents and shooting him to death.'
  • Border Patrol Commander Greg Bovino said the officer who fired was 'highly trained' with eight years of experience, while Minneapolis Police Chief Brian O'Hara confirmed Pretti held a legal permit to carry.
  • Federal authorities labeled Pretti a domestic terrorist; Gov. Tim Walz called the shooting 'sickening' and demanded state control of the investigation.
  • ProPublica later identified the agents as Border Patrol agent Jesus Ochoa and CBP officer Raymundo Gutierrez.
  • Federal authorities physically blocked state investigators and BCA agents from accessing the scene after the shooting.
Minneapolis Police Chief O'Hara: 'This is the third shooting now in less than three weeks by federal agents.'
mediaPlaceholder: Reuters video showing federal officer disarming Pretti moments before the fatal shooting
